items.name: 甲神社のキャラボク
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 西郷村羽太字宮ノ前地内

en.description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the Japanese yew (kyarataboku) of Kabuto Shrine. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 1992-06-30. Located at Habuta Aza Miyanomae, Nishigō Village.
A tangible cultural property, the Koyasu Kannon hall. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 1992-06-30. Located at Housaku Higashi 7, Nishigō Village.
A tangible cultural property, the Daikokuten of Mount Kashi. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 1992-06-30. Located at Mafune Aza Teradaira 2, Nishigō Village.
A tangible cultural property, the Shōkatei pavilion. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 1992-06-30. Located at Mafune Aza Teradaira 2, Nishigō Village.

en.name_en: Seven-Buddha Yakushi Hall Guarding the Demon Gate
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Seven-Buddha Yakushi hall serving to guard the demon gate (kimon). Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 1995-02-08. Located at Nagasaka Aza Nagasaka 153, Nishigō Village.

items.name: 旧軍馬補充部白河支部事務所・敷地
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 西郷村小田倉字上野原463及び464
items.description: 備考: 令和5年1月13日に事務所敷地を「記念物」として追加指定

en.name_romaji: Kyū Gunba Hojūbu Shirakawa Shibu Jimusho Shikichi
en.name_en: Former Shirakawa Branch Office and Grounds of the Army Remount Depot
en.description_en: A monument in the historic site category, the former Shirakawa branch office and its grounds of the army remount depot. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 1997-12-22. Located at Odakura Aza Uenohara 463 and 464, Nishigō Village.

items.name: 延喜式内永倉神社
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 備考: 令和5年1月13日に「有形文化財」から「記念物」へ種別変更

en.name_en: Nagakura Shrine Listed in the Engishiki
en.description_en: A monument, Nagakura Shrine, listed in the Engishiki register. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 1997-12-22. Located at Nagasaka Aza Nagasaka 36, Nishigō Village.
A tangible cultural property, the fire-preventing (hibuse) Kannon hall. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 1997-12-22. Located at Mafune Aza Kannonyama 3, Nishigō Village.

items.name: 三十三観音
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 備考: 令和5年1月13日に「有形文化財」から「記念物」へ種別変更

en.description_en: A monument, the Thirty-Three Kannon. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 1997-12-22. Located at Mafune Aza Kannonyama 3-2, Nishigō Village.

items.name: 田土ヶ入水芭蕉自生地
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 西郷村真船字田土ヶ入7

en.description_en: A monument, the natural habitat of wild skunk cabbage (mizubashō) at Tadogairi. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 1997-12-22. Located at Mafune Aza Tadogairi 7, Nishigō Village.

en.name_en: Mushigasa Dainichi Monument and Two Others
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Mushigasa Dainichi stone monument together with two other monuments. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 2012-04-27. Located at Habuta Aza Ushikubo 46, Nishigō Village.

items.name: 西堂山アラビヤ観音
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A monument, the Arabiya Kannon of Mount Saidō. Village-designated by Nishigō Village on 2021-07-21. Located at Kashiwano Aza Ishikiriba 12, Nishigō Village.
